text.title: QA Test Strategy Template Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the spec artefact this methodology produces. Validator in scripts/validate-qa-test-strategy-template.py enforces required keys, enum bounds, and pattern constraints.

section.title: Schema

example.note: All required keys present; enums and patterns satisfied.
Forbidden traits: risks empty; layers outside allowed enum; page_length_words>1000; missing owner/exit_criterion.
